---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

<br>

.size50[
Final Exam: Research Project Slideshow
]

<br>

<br>

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Fall 2021)
]]

???



---
background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size60[**Final Project Review**]

<br>

.size60[Open your first report and your final report side-by-side]

<br>

<br>

.size60[**In what specific ways do they differ from each other?**]

???

IN WHAT SPECIFIC WAYS DO THEY DIFFER FROM EACH OTHER?

<br>

HOW MUCH HAVE **YOU** GROWN IN TERMS OF YOUR ANALYSES AND DATA SCIENCE SKILLS THIS TERM?


---

class: middle, slideblue

.size30[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size30[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]

<br>

.size30[**LO2: Critical Thinking & Problem Solving Skills**]

.size30[Students should demonstrate an understanding of how research design impacts our confidence in the claims made by researchers, politicians and the media.]

<br>

.size30[**LO3: Communication Skills**]

.size30[Students should demonstrate effective written and data visualization skills.]

???

Here are our LOs for the class.

HOW HAVE YOU PERSONALLY DONE ON THESE THREE LOs?




---

class: slideblue

.size40[**The Big Idea**]

<br>

.size30[
To answer political science questions with data you will develop skills in:

- **Evaluating** data for validity/reliability

- **Cleaning/Preparing** the data

- **Describing** the variation in the data

- **Analyzing** the data to answer questions and test models of politics

- **Reporting** on your findings using clear writing and visualizations
]

???

Here are the specific data skills we worked on.

<br>

WHICH OF THESE DO YOU FEEL THE MOST COMFORTABLE WITH?

WHICH STILL NEED THE MOST WORK?



---

class: middle, slidepurple

.size60[**Final Presentation Slideshow**]

.size40[
+ No more than 10 slides

+ Tell a clear story someone can follow just using the slides

+ Slides MUST be polished (no random code included)

(Due Dec 13, 12:20p) 
]

???

**TEN MINUTES LEFT SWITCH TO COURSE EVALS**


---

class: middle, center, slideblue

.size60[**Course Eval Day**]

<br>

.size35[
https://drury.campuslabs.com/eval-home/direct/3336033
]

???

Today is the last day to submit evals, and I think only two people have done them.
